title: Grounding review for #1242 review compression
goal: Map existing AW review inputs before proposing a review-compression model.
Define draft review modes that preserve human judgment while reducing line-by-line reconstruction work.
scope: Open issue #1242 as an investigation lane.
startup/report/summary/proof outputs, closeout_report, completion_contract, closeout_trust, authority_boundary, decision_pressure, Planning reviews, and PR evidence.
Representative broad/system-shaping examples from PR #1233 and PR #1244.
non_goals: Do not implement a review dashboard in this issue.
Do not replace code review for high-risk work.
Do not claim summary sufficiency when proof, risk, or decision evidence is missing.
Do not add mandatory ceremony for small direct work.

review_mode.review question: Can current AW surfaces be composed into a cheap human review path by work shape, or is a new surface needed?

commands used: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section closeout_report --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section decision_pressure --format json
evidence sources: PR #1233 and PR #1244 bodies and validation evidence
reporting contract and workspace report reference
review_method.limitation: This review defines a grounded model from current surfaces. It does not run a human study or implement the model.

references.label: Draft review-compression model for human supervision

references.target: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section closeout_report --format json
references.label: current closeout_report output

references.target: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section decision_pressure --format json
references.label: current decision_pressure output

issue_classifications.reason: The issue asks to define the model first and only then propose narrow follow-up issues.

draft_review_modes.inspect: final response rendered summary and proof statement only when no residue or lower-trust signal exists
draft_review_modes.current_surface: closeout_report.final_response_rendering with minimal or compact profile

draft_review_modes.inspect: intended outcome, changed surfaces, proof, closure boundary, completeness, and follow-up owner
planned-slice facts plus validation breadth, changed public/contract surfaces, and unresolved issue residue
broad-PR facts plus material decision facts and durable owner
blocking caveat, missing proof or intent evidence, residual risk, owner, and allowed closure claim
draft_review_modes.current_surface: closeout_report profile policy, final_response_rendering constraints, closeout_trust

draft_review_modes.inspect: residue owner, activation trigger, durable routing, and whether final closure is honest
draft_review_modes.current_surface: Planning reviews, closeout_trust, completion_contract, issue follow-up

summary.primary_surface_recommendation: Prefer closeout_report/final_response_rendering as the first compression surface; add decision facts through #1241 before creating any new review surface.
summary.manual_human_judgment: The human still owns acceptance of residual intent, risk tolerance, and whether the evidence is good enough for merge or closure.

findings.title: AW already has enough review inputs to create overload
findings.summary: The current system exposes startup, implement, proof, summary, report sections, closeout_report, completion_contract, closeout_trust, decision_pressure, Planning reviews, and PR validation evidence. #1242 is right that more surfaces without a mode map can increase review cost.
findings.evidence: #1242 names the surface-sprawl risk directly. PR #1233 and #1244 bodies each contain substantial validation and dogfooding detail. Current closeout_report output includes profile policy, validation, residue, traceability, completeness, rendered summary, authority boundary, and detail commands.
findings.risk if unchanged: The human may receive more evidence but still lack a clear path for what to inspect first for the work shape in front of them.
findings.suggested action: Use #1242 to define review modes and first-inspection surfaces before adding any new report or dashboard.
findings.source class: issue scope plus current report and PR evidence
findings.promotion trigger: When deciding how to summarize a broad or system-shaping lane without asking the human to inspect every AW output.

findings.title: closeout_report can be the primary compressor for most closeout review modes
findings.summary: The closeout_report profile policy already distinguishes minimal, compact, balanced, explanatory, and audit output, and final_response_rendering already supplies rendered text plus must_include and must_not_claim constraints.
findings.evidence: The reporting contract states balanced/explanatory/audit closeouts should render material human-facing facts: profile reason, closure boundary, changed work, proof, residual risk, routed residue, and follow-up owner. Current report --section closeout_report emits those fields and a rendered_summary. Tests assert terse minimal output and evidence-backed audit output.
findings.risk if unchanged: A new review-compression surface could duplicate closeout_report instead of making the first inspection path clearer.
findings.suggested action: Start with a closeout-first compression model: use rendered_summary for the user-facing answer, and let detail commands point to closeout_report, closeout_trust, completion_contract, or decision_pressure only when the mode requires it.
findings.source class: contract plus current output plus regression tests
findings.promotion trigger: When drafting implementation follow-ups for review compression.

findings.title: System-shaping review compression depends on #1241 decision facts
findings.summary: The mode that cannot be satisfied by closeout_report alone is system-shaping review. It needs the concrete decisions, rationale, alternatives, affected contracts, proof, and durable owner from #1241.
findings.evidence: Current closeout_report traceability rows cover intent/work/proof/closure, not rejected alternatives or decision rationale. Current decision_pressure is not-configured and reports no decision candidates. #1241 explicitly asks for the missing decision-trace shape.
findings.risk if unchanged: Review compression could hide the exact thing humans need most for large agent-led work: why the system changed in a particular direction.
findings.suggested action: Make #1242 depend on the #1241 minimal decision-review shape for system-shaping mode. Do not declare broad PR review compressed until decision facts are visible or explicitly absent and routed.
findings.source class: cross-issue comparison plus current command output
findings.promotion trigger: When defining system-shaping or broad PR review mode acceptance.

findings.title: Compression must expose what the human still judges manually
findings.summary: The goal is not to replace review with summaries. The compressed view should explicitly name what remains a human acceptance, risk, or handoff decision.
findings.evidence: closeout_report authority_boundary lists human_owned_decisions such as acceptance of residual intent or follow-up ownership when residue exists. final_response_rendering constraints prevent plain-done claims for lower-trust or incomplete evidence. #1242 says summaries must not claim sufficiency when proof or risk evidence is missing.
findings.risk if unchanged: A polished summary could make the work feel reviewed when the actual acceptance, risk, or residual-intent decision has not been made.
findings.suggested action: Add a review-mode acceptance rule: every compressed review must include either 'no material human decision remains' or name the human-owned decision and owner surface.
findings.source class: authority-boundary contract plus issue success criteria
findings.promotion trigger: When converting the model into implementation or issue comments.

recommendation.defer: Keep #1242 as the model owner until the review modes are accepted and #1241 clarifies decision facts.
recommendation.dismiss: Do not dismiss; the current surfaces are useful but not yet organized into a low-cost human review path.
recommendation.first_model: Use closeout_report/final_response_rendering as the primary review compressor, with work-shape mode rules and explicit detail commands. Add decision facts through #1241 before introducing a new top-level surface.
recommendation.possible_follow_up_after_refinement: A narrow issue could add a derived review_mode packet or profile-bound closeout section only if the model cannot be expressed with current closeout_report fields.

retention.closeout shape: keep until #1242 findings are promoted, dismissed, or superseded
retention.trigger: After #1242 has an issue comment or child issues that capture review modes and owner surfaces.
retention.proof surface: This review artifact plus promoted issue refinement.

validation_commands: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-06-03: Populated grounding review after inspecting #1242, PR #1233, PR #1244, closeout_report output, decision_pressure output, reporting contract, and workspace report reference.
